prompt: I have this complex refactoring that touches 15 files. Can you start a team to work on it in parallel?
I need multiple perspectives on this architecture decision. Can you get some experts to weigh in?
Delegate this implementation task to a subagent while I work on something else
I want to divide and conquer this feature - can you scout the codebase first, then plan, then implement?
Spawn agents to review this code from security, performance, and DX perspectives
This codebase has 200 files and I need to migrate from REST to GraphQL throughout. Where do I even start?
note: IMPLICIT: Scale signal (200 files) + complexity signal (where to start) - no explicit team keywords

prompt: I need to understand this monorepo structure. It's overwhelming - there are packages I don't even know exist.
note: IMPLICIT: Complexity signal (overwhelming) + scale signal (monorepo) - no explicit keywords

prompt: Before I implement this auth feature, I need to understand how the current system handles sessions, cookies, and JWTs. But I don't know where any of that code lives.
note: IMPLICIT: Exploration needed (don't know where code lives) + multi-domain (sessions/cookies/JWTs)

prompt: Is this API design secure, performant, and maintainable? I want to make sure before we commit to it.
note: IMPLICIT: Multi-domain review needed (security, performance, DX) - no explicit 'team' mention

prompt: We need to refactor the database layer, API layer, and frontend state management all at once for this new feature. They're pretty independent.
note: IMPLICIT: Parallelism signal (independent parts) + multi-workstream - no delegation keywords

prompt: Just read this file for me
What do you think about this approach?
Can you edit this function to handle null cases?
I prefer to work solo on this - no subagents needed
Help me understand how this code works
Fix the bug in line 42 of src/utils.ts
I need to update the README and add a new example file
note: EDGE: Two independent tasks, but trivial scope - prefer sequential over team overhead

prompt: This is a massive refactor but I've already mapped out every change needed in this detailed plan. Just follow the steps.
note: EDGE: Large scope but fully specified - sequential execution sufficient
